zh.lifeSummary: 當Urraca Of Portugal於1148年出生在葡萄牙可布拉時，她的父親Afonso Henriquez I39歲，母親Matilda De Savoie34歲。她於1165年6月與Ferdinand II De León結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她於1173年住在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安薩莫拉。她去世於1211年10月19日在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安利安享年63歲，埋葬在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安瓦拉阿多利德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Urraca Of Portugal于1148年出生在葡萄牙可布拉时，她的父亲Afonso Henriquez I39岁，母亲Matilda De Savoie34岁。她于1165年6月与Ferdinand II De León结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她于1173年住在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安薩莫拉。她去世于1211年10月19日在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安利安享年63岁，埋葬在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安瓦拉阿多利德。

nameMeanings.name: Of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Portugal
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Juan, Salvador, Alberto, Alejandra, Alejandro, Cesar, Fernando, Jesus, Luis, Manuel.  Portuguese Aderito.

Spanish, Portuguese, Catalan, French, English (Lincolnshire), and Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): ethnic name or habitational name for someone from Portugal or who had connections with Portugal. The name of the country derives from Late Latin Portucale, originally denoting the district around Oporto (Portus Cales, named with Latin portus ‘port, harbor’ + Cales, the ancient name of the city). In some cases the surname may be simply a nickname for someone who had business connections with Portugal. The English surname is a rare variant of Pettengill .

variants.name: Pettengill
meanings: English: medieval English name for someone from Portugal (see Portugal ), from Middle English Portingal(e) ‘Portugal’ (Old French Portugalois), later also meaning ‘Portuguese’.

variants.name: Portal
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Pedro, Carlos, Juan, Luis, Amado, Arnoldo, Caridad, Jose, Norberto, Ricardo, Rosa Elena, Tomas.  Portuguese Amadeu.  Jewish Arie, Ber, Shlomo, Yael, Ziva.  French Marcelle, Andre, Jean Luc.

Spanish, Catalan, Galician, Portuguese, southern French, and Jewish (Sephardic): topographic name for someone who lived near the gates of a fortified town, typically the gatekeeper (from a word, Spanish portal, southern French porta(i)l, meaning ‘gate’); or a habitational name from any of the places in Portugal, Galicia, and France named Portal or, in France, Le Portal.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): possibly a shortened form of   Portugal  .

historicEvents.description: The Christian territory controlled the Kingdoms of Aragon, Navarre, and Castile.

en.lifeSummary: When Urraca Of Portugal was born in 1148, in Coimbra, Portugal, her father, Afonso Henriquez I, was 39 and her mother, Matilda De Savoie, was 34. She married Ferdinand II De León in June 1165. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She lived in Zamora, Castilla y León, Spain in 1173. She died on 19 October 1211, in León, Castilla y León, Spain, at the age of 63, and was buried in Valladolid, Castilla y León, Spain.

fr.Benavente, Zamora, Castilla y León, Spai: Benavente, Zamora, Castilla y León, Espagne
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Urraca Of Portugal est née en 1148, à Coimbra, Portugal, son père, Afonso Henriquez I, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Matilda De Savoie, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé Ferdinand II De León en juin 1165. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle a vécu à Zamora, Castilla y León, Espagne en 1173. Elle est décédée le 19 octobre 1211, à León, Castilla y León, Espagne, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterrée à Valladolid, Castilla y León, Espagne.

de.Benavente, Zamora, Castilla y León, Spai: Benavente, Zamora, Castilla y León, Spanien
de.lifeSummary: Als Urraca Of Portugal 1148 in Coimbra, Portugal geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Afonso Henriquez I 39 und ihre Mutter Matilda De Savoie 34. Sie hat im Juni 1165 Ferdinand II De León geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. 1173 hat sie in Zamora, Castilla y León, Spanien gelebt. Sie starb am 19. Oktober 1211 im Alter von 63 Jahren in León, Castilla y León, Spanien und wurde in Valladolid, Castilla y León, Spanien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Urraca Of Portugal è nata il nel 1148 nel Coimbra, Portogallo, sua padre, Afonso Henriquez I, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Matilda De Savoie, aveva 34 anni. Lei sposato Ferdinand II De León nel giugno 1165. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Vissuto a Zamora, Castilla y León, Spagna nel 1173. Morì il 19 ottobre 1211, nel León, Castilla y León, Spagna, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolta a Valladolid, Castilla y León, Spagna.

ja.lifeSummary: Urraca Of Portugalが1148年にポルトガルコインブラで生まれた時，父Afonso Henriquez Iは39歳，母Matilda De Savoieは34歳であった。1165年6月にFerdinand II De Leónと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1173年にはスペインカスティラ イ レoンザモーアに住んでいた。彼女は1211年10月19日にスペインカスティラ イ レoンレoンで63歳で死去し，スペインカスティラ イ レoンヴァラドリドにて埋葬された。

ko.Benavente, Zamora, Castilla y León, Spai: 스페인 카스틸라 와이 레o 자모라 베나븐트
ko.lifeSummary: Urraca Of Portugal(이)가 1148년 포르투갈 코임브라에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Afonso Henriquez I(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Matilda De Savoie(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 1165년 6월 Ferdinand II De León(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 1173년도에 스페인 카스틸라 와이 레o 자모라에서 살았다. 그녀는 1211년 10월 19일 스페인 카스틸라 이 레o 레o에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 스페인 카스틸라 와이 레o 발라도리드에 묻혔다.

pt.Benavente, Zamora, Castilla y León, Spai: Benavente, Zamora, Castilla y León, Espanha
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Urraca Of Portugal nasceu em 1148, em Coimbra, Portugal, seu pai, Afonso Henriquez I, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Matilda De Savoie, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com Ferdinand II De León em junho de 1165. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela viveu em Zamora, Castilla y León, Espanha em 1173. Ela faleceu em 19 de outubro de 1211, em León, Castilla y León, Espanha, com 63 anos, e foi sepultada em Valladolid, Castilla y León, Espanha.

ru.Benavente, Zamora, Castilla y León, Spai: бенавент, замора, кастилла и леoн, Испания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Urraca Of Portugal родилась в 1148 г. в местности коимбра, Португалия, её отцу по имени Afonso Henriquez I было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda De Savoie, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ferdinand II De León июнь 1165 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она жила в местности замора, кастилла и леoн, Испания в 1173 году. Она умерла 19 октября 1211 г. в местности леoн, кастилла и леoн, Испания в возрасте 63 лет и была похоронена в местности валладолид, кастилла и леoн, Испания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Urraca Of Portugal nació en 1148, en Coimbra, Portugal, su papá, Afonso Henriquez I, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Matilda De Savoie, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Ferdinand II De León en junio de 1165. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Vivió en Zamora, Castilla y León, España en 1173. Murió el 19 de octubre de 1211, en León, Castilla y León, España, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultada en Valladolid, Castilla y León, España.
